issues.title: Checkout total drifts after coupon rollback

decisions.title: Move coupon rollback into pricing reducer
decisions.context: State mutation happens in both cart and payment views.
decisions.decision: Normalize rollback in the reducer and keep UI as a pure renderer.
decisions.consequence: Lower UI drift, requires reducer regression coverage.

decisions.title: Reject view-level patch
decisions.context: A view-only fix hides drift in one checkout route.
decisions.decision: Do not patch the component total calculation.
decisions.consequence: Slightly larger diff, better cross-route behavior.

acceptance.label: Unit tests cover coupon add, remove, rollback
E2E verifies checkout and confirmation totals
Diff contains no payment gateway contract change

issues.title: Session refresh loop on expired SSO token

decisions.title: Single-flight refresh guard
decisions.context: Multiple tabs call refresh after the same token expiry.
decisions.decision: Gate refresh with a single-flight promise keyed by tenant.
decisions.consequence: Prevents retry storms, needs tenant isolation tests.

decisions.title: No silent logout on first refresh failure
decisions.context: Network jitter currently pushes users to login.
decisions.decision: Retry once with jitter and then show re-auth state.
decisions.consequence: Better UX, one extra auth branch.

acceptance.label: Auth telemetry does not log raw token data

issues.title: Incident banner stays visible after resolution

decisions.title: Invalidate cache from incident state transition
decisions.context: Banner cache is refreshed by polling only.
decisions.decision: Emit invalidation when incidents move to resolved.
decisions.consequence: Faster UI consistency, one new event path.

acceptance.label: State transition test covers resolved incidents
Manual screenshot captured for active and resolved states
No cache key change for public status pages

issues.title: Bulk import accepts duplicate external ids

decisions.title: Reject duplicates before persistence
decisions.context: Current import dedupe happens after partial writes.
decisions.decision: Validate external ids in a preflight import plan.
decisions.consequence: No partial duplicate writes, higher memory use for large files.

decisions.title: Keep existing upsert semantics
decisions.context: Customers depend on update by external id.
decisions.decision: Only reject duplicates inside the same uploaded file.
decisions.consequence: Avoids breaking integrations, needs fixture coverage.

acceptance.label: Fixture with duplicate rows fails before write

issues.title: Kanban swimlane count is stale after drag

decisions.title: Recompute lane counts from normalized board state
decisions.context: Drag operations update cards before lane counters.
decisions.decision: Derive counts from normalized state selectors.
decisions.consequence: Removes manual counter sync, changes selector cache boundary.

acceptance.label: Drag between lanes updates both counts
Undo drag restores source and target counts

issues.title: Report export drops timezone on scheduled jobs

decisions.title: Store schedule timezone with export manifest
decisions.context: Job execution stores UTC time but not the user's timezone.
decisions.decision: Persist timezone in the export manifest and hydrate CSV metadata.
decisions.consequence: Stable scheduled exports, backward-compatible manifest parser.

acceptance.label: Scheduler regression passes for DST boundary
